text: The transition from sterile, glass-walled corporate space to the vibrant R+D exhibit feels like the crossing of a threshold. Here, in this gallery of ideas, my curiosity awakens. The words on the wall echo my own inner questions—wondering about the nature of observation, invention, and meaning in everyday life. I feel a mix of quiet excitement and contemplative solitude. The world here is both a puzzle and an invitation; I am drawn to linger and think, finding comfort in the act of questioning.
